text.title: Agent Kill-Switch Design Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when agent-kill-switch-design is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), root cause (`reason`), and corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Global kill fires, takes 90 seconds to take effect.
antipattern.reason: No latency budget; per-instance cache lookups slow.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r2: push-based propagation; budget ≤5s p95.

antipattern.description: Kill triggered for one bug, freezes all tenants for a week.
Engineer flipped kill, then went home; service down 14 hours.
antipattern.note: Fix: Apply r4: written recovery + approval gate.
